'''sashasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:osculation|osculation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:osculation|osculation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| sashasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæshæsæth|sæshæsæth]] || [[word:sæshæsæj|sæshæsæj]] || [[word:sæshæsæsh|sæshæsæsh]] || [[word:sæshæsæ|sæshæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sashashasath|sashashasath]] || [[word:sashashasaj|sashashasaj]] || [[word:sashashasash|sashashasash]] || [[word:sashashasa|sashashasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sashasath|sashasath]] || [[word:sashasaj|sashasaj]] || [[word:sashasash|sashasash]] || [[word:sashasa|sashasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sashafsafth|sashafsafth]] || [[word:sashafsafj|sashafsafj]] || [[word:sashafsafsh|sashafsafsh]] || [[word:sashafsaf|sashafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sashasatha|sashasatha]] || [[word:sashasaja|sashasaja]] || [[word:sashasasha|sashasasha]] || [[word:sashasaka|sashasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sashasath|sashasath]] || [[word:sashasaj|sashasaj]] || [[word:sashasash|sashasash]] || [[word:sashasa|sashasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sashasathal|sashasathal]] || [[word:sashasajal|sashasajal]] || [[word:sashasashal|sashasashal]] || [[word:sashasakal|sashasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sashasaathatha|sashasaathatha]] || [[word:sashasaajaja|sashasaajaja]] || [[word:sashasaashasha|sashasaashasha]] || [[word:sashasaaka|sashasaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sashasathan|sashasathan]] || [[word:sashasajan|sashasajan]] || [[word:sashasashan|sashasashan]] || [[word:sashasakan|sashasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sashasathaoro|sashasathaoro]] || [[word:sashasajaoro|sashasajaoro]] || [[word:sashasashaoro|sashasashaoro]] || [[word:sashasakaoro|sashasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b470777}}
